description_en: Madrid, in Spain, is a halal-friendly destination with a Halal Trust Score of 4.3/5. Muslim travelers will find 200 halal restaurants, 1 mosques, real-time prayer times and the Qibla direction — a complete guide to travel with peace of mind.
